assignments.description: Builds the sparse Household Account SObject for the push-up update. Sets Phone to match the person's new PersonHomePhone value.
assignments.name: Assign_Update_Household_Phone
assignments.label: Assign Update Household Phone

decisions.description: After the ACR lookup, checks whether this person has a synced Household ACR (IsNull=false) and that the ACR's Roles contains 'Household Member'. Uses the result of Get_First_Synced_ACR_Phone — no additional query needed. The Roles check is decision-level only; it must not be placed in a SOQL filter because Contains on a multi-select picklist generates invalid SOQL at runtime.
decisions.name: Has_Synced_Household_For_Push_Phone
decisions.label: Has Synced Household For Push (Phone)?

decisions.description: Checks whether the Household Account's Phone differs from the person's new PersonHomePhone. Only fires the push-up update when there is a real difference — comparison guard that terminates the cascade loop when values converge after one round trip.
decisions.name: Household_Phone_Differs
decisions.label: Household Phone Differs?

Flow.description: Account AfterSave flow gated to IsPersonAccount=true. When the person's PersonHomePhone changes, looks up the first active synced ACR (IsActive=true, Sync_Household_Phone__c=true, Roles contains Household Member) and pushes the new phone value up to the Household Account.Phone when it differs. SMQS_Sync_Business_Account_Phone_To_Members handles the cascade to other household members. Recursion terminates through comparison guards. No CPP upsert here — the existing SMQS Phone trio handles ContactPointPhone reconciliation downstream.
Flow.interviewLabel: SMQS Phone Sync Person Account to Household Account {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: SMQS Phone Sync Person Account to Household Account

recordLookups.description: Gets the first active synced ACR (IsActive=true, Sync_Household_Phone__c=true) for this Person Account's underlying Contact. The Household Member role check is done in Has_Synced_Household_For_Push_Phone using a decision-level Contains condition rather than a SOQL filter — SOQL Contains on a multi-select picklist generates invalid SOQL at runtime.
recordLookups.name: Get_First_Synced_ACR_Phone
recordLookups.label: Get First Synced ACR (Phone)

recordLookups.description: Loads the Household Account's current Phone field for the comparison in Household_Phone_Differs.
recordLookups.name: Get_Household_For_Push_Phone
recordLookups.label: Get Household For Push (Phone)

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Household Account's Phone field with the person's new PersonHomePhone value. This fires SMQS_Sync_Business_Account_Phone_To_Members, which cascades to all other synced members. The Household_Phone_Differs guard ensures this only runs when there is a real difference.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Household_Account_Phone
recordUpdates.label: Update Household Account Phone

variables.description: Sparse Account SObject for updating the Household Account's Phone field during the push-up step.
variables.name: var_HouseholdToUpdate
